overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai in elaborate armor exploring a Japanese village during spring. The character walks from an outdoor rural area with thatched-roof huts and cherry blossoms, ascends stone steps through a temple gate, and enters a dimly lit traditional building with shoji screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village with thatched-roof huts and stone walls

events.description: moves from enclosed village path to open area with mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village, passing wooden huts and stone walls while heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: open-sided wooden structure with straw thatch roof in the village center
low stone wall running along the left side of the path
simple wooden post fence marking property boundaries
distant snow-capped mountain visible above the village

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a sunlit rural Japanese village with traditional thatched-roof structures and stone walls. The environment features blooming vegetation and distant mountain views as the character moves along dirt paths between wooden huts.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach with stone steps and traditional gate

events.description: begins ascending stone steps toward the temple gate entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up wide stone steps through the temple gate, approaching the main building entrance

entered.detail: traditional Japanese gate with curved tiled roof and massive wooden pillars
traditional stone lantern flanking the left side of the entrance path
matching stone lantern on the right side of the entrance path
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
white flowering cherry tree in full bloom near the temple approach

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a formal temple complex, leaving the rural huts behind. The scene features ascending wide stone steps flanked by traditional stone lanterns and cherry blossom trees, leading up to an imposing temple gate with curved tiled roofing.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese interior with shoji screens and painted walls

events.description: enters the dark interior building from bright sunlight, dramatic light transition

agents.ego_description: walking into the dimly lit temple interior, examining the painted screens and traditional architecture

entered.detail: traditional paper sliding doors with wooden lattice frames allowing diffused light
decorative wall painting with floral motifs illuminated by interior lantern light
traditional Japanese lantern providing warm ambient lighting in the dark interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple building, transitioning from bright daylight to a dimly lit interior illuminated by hanging lanterns. The space features traditional shoji screens and painted wall panels, creating an intimate atmosphere as the character explores the wooden-floored room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open rural village into the intimate, shadowed interior of a traditional temple. It begins by following a samurai along dirt paths between thatched-roof huts and stone walls, surrounded by blooming vegetation and distant mountain views. As the character leaves the village behind, the scene shifts toward a formal temple complex, ascending wide stone steps flanked by stone lanterns and cherry blossom trees toward an imposing tiled gate. The camera then moves through the gateway and into the temple building, where the bright daylight gives way to a dimly lit interior illuminated by hanging lanterns. Finally, the environment settles into a quiet wooden-floored room defined by traditional shoji screens and painted wall panels.
